title: Fraction to Decimal Calculator
description: Converts fractions (including mixed numbers) to decimal equivalents with precision, uncertainty analysis, and industrial-grade rounding per ISO 80000-1 and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Numerator
inputs.businessContext: The top part of the fraction (dividend). For mixed numbers, use the fractional part only.

businessContext_i18n.en: The top part of the fraction (dividend). For mixed numbers, use the fractional part only.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesrin üst kısmı (bölünen). Tam sayılı kesirlerde yalnızca kesirli kısmı kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der obere Teil des Bruchs (Dividend). Bei gemischten Zahlen nur den Bruchteil angeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La partie supérieure de la fraction (dividende). Pour les nombres fractionnaires, utilisez uniquement la partie fractionnaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: La parte superior de la fracción (dividendo). Para números mixtos, use solo la parte fraccionaria.

inputs.label: Denominator
inputs.businessContext: The bottom part of the fraction (divisor). Must be non-zero.

businessContext_i18n.en: The bottom part of the fraction (divisor). Must be non-zero.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesrin alt kısmı (bölen). Sıfırdan farklı olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der untere Teil des Bruchs (Divisor). Muss ungleich Null sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La partie inférieure de la fraction (diviseur). Doit être non nul.
businessContext_i18n.es: La parte inferior de la fracción (divisor). Debe ser distinto de cero.

inputs.label: Whole Number (for mixed fractions)
inputs.businessContext: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for proper fractions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Integer part of a mixed number (e.g., 3 in 3 1/4). Set to 0 for proper fractions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam sayı kısmı (ör. 3 1/4'te 3). Basit kesirler için 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ganzzahliger Teil einer gemischten Zahl (z. B. 3 bei 3 1/4). Bei echten Brüchen auf 0 setzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie entière d'un nombre fractionnaire (ex. 3 dans 3 1/4). Mettre 0 pour les fractions propres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Parte entera de un número mixto (ej., 3 en 3 1/4). Establezca 0 para fracciones propias.

inputs.label: Decimal Places (precision)
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the result. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the result. Follows ISO 80000-1 rounding rules.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonuç için ondalık basamak sayısı. ISO 80000-1 yuvarlama kurallarına uyar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das Ergebnis. Folgt den Rundungsregeln nach ISO 80000-1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat. Suit les règles d'arrondi ISO 80000-1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el resultado. Sigue las reglas de redondeo ISO 80000-1.

inputs.label: Rounding Method
inputs.businessContext: Rounding rule per ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommended for statistical work).

businessContext_i18n.en: Rounding rule per ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommended for statistical work).
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 80000-1'e göre yuvarlama kuralı (istatistiksel çalışmalar için half_even önerilir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Rundungsregel nach ISO 80000-1 (half_even für statistische Arbeiten empfohlen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Règle d'arrondi selon ISO 80000-1 (half_even recommandé pour les travaux statistiques).
businessContext_i18n.es: Regla de redondeo según ISO 80000-1 (se recomienda half_even para trabajo estadístico).

inputs.label: Measurement Uncertainty (±)
inputs.businessContext: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). Used for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute uncertainty in the numerator (e.g., from measurement tolerance). Used for Six Sigma uncertainty propagation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paydaki mutlak belirsizlik (ör. ölçüm toleransından). Altı Sigma belirsizlik yayılımı için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Absolute Unsicherheit im Zähler (z. B. aus Messtoleranz). Für Six Sigma Unsicherheitsfortpflanzung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Incertitude absolue au numérateur (ex. tolérance de mesure). Utilisée pour la propagation d'incertitude Six Sigma.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incertidumbre absoluta en el numerador (p. ej., de la tolerancia de medición). Se utiliza para la propagación de incertidumbre en Seis Sigma.

rules.message: Decimal places must be between 0 and 15.

thresholds.message: Denominator has prime factors other than 2 and 5 — decimal may be repeating.
Relative uncertainty exceeds 10% — result may be unreliable.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
